label: Terminal UI surface registry (config-as-data; DKR §2 · FS-10000 Terminal IA). Declares the WHOLE product surface area — every route, its nav section, primary object, planned tabs/commands/human-gates, and the doctrine state legend it must render (current/missing/stale/inferred/synthetic/restricted/pending_approval/conflicted). `status: live` is an implemented surface; `status: scaffold` is a framed placeholder/wireframe pending build. Look/feel is deliberately deferred (Sprint IV Terminal polish) — this registry frames the product so surfaces can be built + reviewed against one map. Generic: no engine logic here; the loader (core/registry/ui_surfaces.ts) validates it as a closed graph.

surfaces.title: Home — Command Center
surfaces.purpose: Priority alerts, assigned tasks, the approval queue, active workflows, top opportunities, and stale data for the current workspace.

surfaces.title: Institution Terminal
surfaces.purpose: The live deal-pipeline surface for one institution: harness stage rail with the human gate, institution + deal scorecards, executive-lens toggle, IC memo, allocation, settlement.

surfaces.title: Institutions — Directory
surfaces.purpose: Search + browse the full institution market, filter by asset-band/readiness/label, sort, and open any institution's Terminal. Scales from one institution to thousands. Figures labeled synthetic; region is not sourced (shown missing).

surfaces.title: Market
surfaces.purpose: The institution-profile list from 5300 ingestion plus the real NCUA regulatory environment and Object-Registry status.

surfaces.title: Executives & Boards
surfaces.purpose: Executive and board profiles per institution: role, tenure, committees, sourced from public disclosures. Every claim drills to its source.

surfaces.title: Relationships
surfaces.fs_ref: FS-9000 · Knowledge Graph (relationships as first-class objects)
surfaces.purpose: The relationship graph across institutions, companies, and people — stage, evidence, history, opportunity, and next action for each edge.

surfaces.title: Opportunities
surfaces.purpose: Sourced opportunities across the network: each links to a workflow and an owner, drills to evidence, and routes regulated conclusions to a human gate.

surfaces.title: Workflows & Tasks
surfaces.purpose: Active workflows and their tasks: status, dependencies, approvals, and audit history. Every workflow exposes its approvals and lineage.

surfaces.title: Work — Items
surfaces.purpose: The live work-item queue rendered from the widget/render layer — assign, note, add evidence, record outcome.

surfaces.title: Proposals
surfaces.purpose: The propose→decide surface: proposals promoted or rejected by an authorized human; nothing is auto-applied.

surfaces.title: Evidence & Provenance
surfaces.purpose: Every material claim drills through to source, capture, observation date, freshness, and review status over live evidence. Inferred (agent-captured) values are marked as inferences; stale evidence is flagged; reviewing routes through the permission engine.

surfaces.title: Approvals
surfaces.purpose: The live human approval queue over the store's approval objects. Final lending, investment, compliance, and capital-allocation decisions require an authorized human approval object — never an automated recommendation — and route through the permission engine (authorize-first).

surfaces.title: Review
surfaces.purpose: The live evidence-review surface: an authorized human reviews sourced evidence; the decision comes from the permission engine.

surfaces.title: Network — Market & Review Queue
surfaces.purpose: The joint network surface: the propose-only review queue (cross-source entity duplicates + external-canon alias proposals awaiting human confirm/reject — nothing auto-merges) over the full-market institution profiles (labeled synthetic until a real bulk 5300 feed lands).

surfaces.title: Network Search & Discovery
surfaces.purpose: Universal search + command over every canonical object (institutions, people, companies, opportunities). Search and command coexist with structured navigation.

surfaces.title: Dashboards
surfaces.purpose: The widget-driven dashboard runtime rendered from core/widgets — metric tiles, work, inputs, evidence, proposals, approvals, and reports.

surfaces.title: Reports & Builder
surfaces.purpose: Report templates and a builder. Exports preserve evidence references and a snapshot timestamp; regulated conclusions carry their approval lineage.

surfaces.title: Observability
surfaces.purpose: The kernel cost dashboard + event replay over the append-only log, with run health.

surfaces.title: Publication — Distribution
surfaces.purpose: The editorial-gated publication loop: channel deliveries (brief / market-feed / terminal-feed) publish only on an approved human EditorialDisposition; held/rejected → nothing published.

surfaces.title: Collaboration — Notes & Meetings
surfaces.purpose: Shared notes, meeting briefs, and activity threads attached to canonical objects — evidence-linked, visibility-aware.

surfaces.title: Cartridges
surfaces.purpose: Installed capability cartridges (schemas, rules, prompts, workflows, metrics, permissions, render contracts). Cooperative Markets is the first. Cartridges extend capability through configuration, not vertical forks.

surfaces.title: Persona Workspaces
surfaces.purpose: Role-based workspace presets (executive / operator / analyst) that adjust information density without hiding governance. Same canonical objects, different lens.

surfaces.title: Administration & Configuration
surfaces.purpose: Tenant, workspace, membership, role, and permission configuration; source/connector catalog administration; environment (demo/sandbox/pilot/production). Server-authoritative — hidden controls are never a substitute for enforcement.
